# Truckee Snowbotics

> FTC Team #32587 — a student-run FIRST Tech Challenge robotics team based at Tahoe-Truckee High School in Truckee, California. Founded 2025. Fiscally sponsored by Hack Club, a 501(c)(3) nonprofit (EIN: 81-2908499).

We design, build, and program competitive robots for the FIRST Tech Challenge (FTC) competition circuit in the Northern Nevada region.

## Pages

- [Home](https://snowbotics.org/): Team overview, latest news, and donation options.
- [Information](https://snowbotics.org/information/): Details about FTC, how to join the team, and our nonprofit structure.
- [Gallery](https://snowbotics.org/gallery/): Photos from the build floor, competitions, and events.
- [Season](https://snowbotics.org/season/): Current season results, robot specs, and past season archive.
- [Sponsors](https://snowbotics.org/sponsors/): Current sponsors, donation info, and how to become a sponsor.
- [Contact](https://snowbotics.org/contact/): Contact form and sponsorship inquiries.
- [About](https://snowbotics.org/about/): Meet the team members and mentors.

## Contact

- Email: contact@snowbotics.org
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/truckeesnowbotics/
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@TruckeeSnowbotics
- GitHub: https://github.com/truckee-snowbotics
- Donate: https://hcb.hackclub.com/donations/start/truckee-snowbotics
